response.answer: You currently have 6 sick days and 14 PTO days remaining.

citations.text:
## Time off and leave

### Paid time off (PTO)

Full-time employees accrue **PTO** according to the accrual schedule published on the internal HR portal. PTO requests must be submitted **at least 10 business days** in advance unless your manager approves an exception for emergencies.

Unused PTO may roll over up to **5 days** into the next calendar year unless local policy states otherwise.

retrieval_attempts.query: How many PTO days do I have?
retrieval_attempts.reason: The retrieved chunk provides information about the accrual and rollover of PTO but does not specify the exact number of PTO days an employee has.
